characters.name: "Classified"
characters.description: "Classified"Personal DetailsGenderMaleSpeciesEurasian wolf (Canis lupus lupus)StatusAliveFamilyUnnamed parents (mentioned)OccupationLeader of the North Wind Task ForceOther InformationFriendsSkipperRicoKowalskiPrivateShort FuseCorporalEvaEnemiesDaveResides inNorth Wind HeadquartersAffiliateNorth WindProduction InformationFirst AppearancePenguins of Madagascar: The MovieVoiced byBenedict Cumberbatch  Classified, though not antagonistic, always attempts his acts with professionalism and a stern demeanor, despite constantly failing to achieve his objectives. He has full belief in his squad, opting to ignore external assistance as long as he has the team around, and dislikes being proven wrong on that aspect too.

characters.name: Kathy
characters.description: Kathy is a gecko who appears inFast Food Lemur Nation. She is one of the geckos who volunteers to make Booty Doodles.

characters.name: Snake
characters.description: SnakePersonal DetailsGenderMaleSpeciesLemurStatusAlive (inside Ted)FamilyDorothyTedOther InformationEnemiesTentacle(Previously)Raised inTed's MindResides inTed's MindProduction InformationFirst AppearanceIron Ted WeekendAdditional Appearance(s)Spin CycleOne More Cup, Part 2(on photo wall)The End is Here(mentioned)Voiced byAndy RichterSnake is the alter-ego ofTed. He appears to help Ted fight and bring out Ted's dominant side. He met Ted onSiren Island, when he helped Ted defeat theTentacle. After that, he appears inSpin Cycle, where Dr. S helps Ted become Snake. Shortly after, Dorothy finds she doesn't like Snake, so she tells him to go into the exploding generator and fix it. He doesn't fix it but instead becomes Ted again. Ted

characters.name: Abby
characters.description: AbbyPersonal DetailsGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanAgeChildStatusAliveOther InformationResides inCanadaProduction InformationFirst AppearanceMerry MadagascarVoiced byWillow Smith Alex,Marty,Melman, andGloriacrash into her house while filling in forSantainMerry Madagascar. This surprises Abby when she sees this, and she thinks of them as Santa's hairy helpers. Making herself confident around them, she hugs Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria (the last of whom hugs her back). She then blows dust off a plate of four cookies and gives it to them. She hugs Alex again, and tells him not to tellSantashe was up. Abby then goes back to bed, despite thinking she can't sleep from meeting "Santa's hairy helpers." She starts falling back down the stairs (much to the Zoosters' shock), thinking she broke her collarbone. It turns out she didn't, and then she actually goes back to bed this time.

characters.name: Abner
characters.description: AbnerPersonal DetailsGenderMaleSpeciesLemur (SeeOther)AgeMiddle agedStatusAliveFamilyBecca(Wife)Other InformationEnemiesKing Julien(formerly)Clover(formerly)Raised inMadagascarResides inMadagascarAffiliateLALAProduction InformationFirst AppearanceMadagascarAdditional Appearance(s)Empty is the HeadViva MortOne More CupMy Fair FoosaPineapple Of My EyeGimmie Gimmie Gimmie: The GameDaddy JulienGet Off My LawnRun for the BorderThat Sinking FeelingThe Good BookJulien 2.0Spin CycleBlackboard JungleLord of the Fruit FliesKing Julien is Watching YouThe End is NearThe End is HereVoiced byJeffrey Katzenberg(Madagascar)Diedrich Bader Clover(formerly) Abner, like Becca, has a southern accent and is a hillbilly. Abner seems to be older than Becca, as he forgets easily, and isn't as perky and limber. Despite Becca not being too smart herself, Abner is the dumber of the two. Becca will get annoyed with dumb things he says. One example of this is when Becca suggests they both stay still like statues so that Mort will move away, but Abner loudly says, "being a statue" when Mort asks what they are doing. Abner, despite his dangerous plans to overthrow King Julien, still has a conscience (maybe more than Becca), as he refused to fight with Clover. He said, "It ain't right to hit a lady!". This however, prompted Becca to make a failed attempt to hit her, since she and Clover are both females. Though he is older than a lot of the lemurs, he still uses some teen slang, such as "smh".

HenchmenKing Fossa Alex has the personality very similar to that of a celebrity because he became the star of the zoo at a very young age. Alex loves the zoo and was surprised when he heard Marty's wish to leave and live in the wild. As the main attraction of the zoo, he is featured heavily on merchandise and gives an "Alex the Lion" snow globe and other merchandise to Marty for his birthday. He also shows an infatuation with steak, though later remarks that sushi tastes better. In the first film, he was very scared when he discovered his predatory nature and did his best to isolate himself from others to protect them. Despite his pride and selfishness, Alex is very loyal to his other Zooster friends, especially Marty. Alex never loses the opportunity to show off and boast that he is a star, but sometimes some situations make him nervous, like when he tries to deal with the penguins or his attempts to fl
characters.personality_section: Alex has the personality very similar to that of a celebrity because he became the star of the zoo at a very young age. Alex loves the zoo and was surprised when he heard Marty's wish to leave and live in the wild. As the main attraction of the zoo, he is featured heavily on merchandise and gives an "Alex the Lion" snow globe and other merchandise to Marty for his birthday. He also shows an infatuation with steak, though later remarks that sushi tastes better. In the first film, he was very scared when he discovered his predatory nature and did his best to isolate himself from others to protect them. Despite his pride and selfishness, Alex is very loyal to his other Zooster friends, especially Marty. Alex never loses the opportunity to show off and boast that he is a star, but sometimes some situations make him nervous, like when he tries to deal with the penguins or his attempts to flirt with Gia in the circus. He is also determined to fix things when he knows he spoiled them, like when he fights with Marty, or his attempt to re-fit into the lion's pride or to convince the Zoosters to return to the circus and apologize to everyone. Alex is also very energetic, he is able to raise morale to everyone around him and also has good leadership skills, especially in the third film, when he even manages to lead a complete circus.

characters.name: Amelia
characters.description: AmeliaPersonal DetailsSpeciesHumanStatusDeceasedAmelia (though this is presumably not their real name) is the remains of a human who died, likely in the plane crash which left theplanestuck in the largest baobab tree in thekingdom. This plane would later become King Julien’s throne room. Amelia currently sits inside the plane, and had presumably been sitting in the seat next to the pilot when the crash occurred.King Julientook a liking to this skeleton, named it Amelia, and begun conferring with it when he had problems, inquiries, or something on his mind. He often believed the skeleton was silently communicating with him.

characters.name: Andy Fairfax
characters.description: Andy FairfaxPersonal DetailsGenderMaleSpeciesMadagascar Flying FoxStatusAliveOccupationSeller of miscellaneous productsOther InformationFriendsPanchoKing JulienResides inMadagascarProduction InformationFirst AppearanceGet Off My LawnAdditional Appearance(s)The All Hail King Julien ShowJulien 2.0Spin CycleNight CreaturesSquad Goals(on photo wall)Blackboard JungleKarl-MageddonKing Julien is Watching YouThe End is HereVoiced byDiedrich Bader  Andy is a charismatic, charming, smooth-talking bat, though he doesn't always put these qualities to good use. He often cons people and charms them out of their senses for personal gain. He has a tendency to be obnoxious, such as when he laughs and flies away after his scorpions take over the kingdom, and his overall proud attitude about his dishonest nature.

characters.name: Antonio
characters.description: AntonioPersonal DetailsNicknameThe Otter Bachelor of Central ParkGenderMaleSpeciesOriental Small-Clawed Otter (Aonyx cinerea)StatusAliveOther InformationFriendsFredResides inCentral Park, NYProduction InformationFirst AppearanceOtter Things Have HappenedAdditional Appearance(s)The Lost Treasure of the Golden SquirrelVoiced byDanny Jacobs Antoniois an otter who appears inThe Penguins of Madagascar. He lives in Central Park. He is friends withFredthe squirrel. He is friends withFredthe squirrel. Fred was just in the path of the penguins in their search for the perfect guy forMarlene, and therefore they thought Fred was perfect for Marlene. It turned out, Antonio was actually the one for Marlene. Marlene would definitely love him, one reason is that he plays guitar.

characters.name: April
characters.description: AprilPersonal DetailsGenderFemaleSpeciesLemurStatusAliveFamilyTrevor(partner)Other InformationFriendsTrevorResides inThe KingdomProduction InformationFirst AppearanceNight CreaturesAdditional Appearance(s)Lord of the Fruit FliesVoiced byKether Donohue  Aprilis a character in All Hail King Julien. She appeared once in the episodeNight Creatures, watching a film with her partner,Trevor. After hearing something in the jungle, she was frightened and ultimately was "eaten" by theNight Creature.

characters.name: Archie
characters.description: ArchiePersonal DetailsNicknameThe ArcherGenderMaleSpeciesRaccoon(Procyon lotor)StatusAliveOther InformationResides inCentral Park,NYProduction InformationFirst AppearanceMask of the RaccoonAdditional Appearance(s)The Big MoveNuts to YouVoiced byRob Paulsen Archieis a raccoon who steals stuff from the zoo. He is a sort of "Robin Hood" character. He speaks with a fake French accent and is friends withFred. He says that he takes stuff so he can give it to the less fortunate, when he really just takes it for himself. In the end, he is forced to do good deeds by the penguins. He appears again inThe Big Movenow working as a dubious property agent where he convinces Rico to buy a tree, though this time he speaks with his normal accent and he doesn't wear his Robin Hood costume.

characters.name: Archie
characters.description: ArchiePersonal DetailsNicknameThe ArcherGenderMaleSpeciesRaccoon(Procyon lotor)StatusAliveOther InformationResides inCentral Park,NYProduction InformationFirst AppearanceMask of the RaccoonAdditional Appearance(s)The Big MoveNuts to YouVoiced byRob Paulsen Archieis a raccoon who steals stuff from the zoo. He is a sort of "Robin Hood" character. He speaks with a fake French accent and is friends withFred. He says that he takes stuff so he can give it to the less fortunate, when he really just takes it for himself. In the end, he is forced to do good deeds by the penguins. He appears again inThe Big Movenow working as a dubious property agent where he convinces Rico to buy a tree, though this time he speaks with his normal accent and he doesn't wear his Robin Hood costume.

Bowes TheAssistantwas a minor character who appears in theMadagascar A Little Wildepisode,A Roar Is Born. She is the assistant to Director JJ Luna.

characters.name: Aye Aye Royal Family Tree
characters.description: Aye Aye Royal Family TreeFamily DetailsKnown MembersBrodneyBrondaBrodney’s ChildrenSpeciesAye AyesPrimary ResidenceAye-Aye KingdomFriendsKingdom of MadagascarEnemiesMountain Lemur Kingdom The Aye Aye royal family is closely intertwined with theJulien Royal Familyand is founded by Brodney after becoming Julien’s adopted brother inO Brother Where Art Thou?After being officially declared Julien’s brother Brodney realizes he is older and is therefore now king. He panics, and Julien’s parents quickly decide he must find a wife in order to descend the throne. He cannot seem to find one, so his new parents decide to dispose of him in a “pit of ultimate suckage”. Brodney is then rescued by Julien who tells him he is a valuable brother regardless of his age. Mort eventually finds a female aye aye, Bronda, and the two marry. Bronda and his new wife leave to start there own kingdom, theAye Aye Kingdom.It is unknown if there was any system of government in place before the kingdom was founded. Brodney is the founding member of the Aye Aye royal family tree.  Although he was adopted by Prince Barty and Princess Julienne as a little brother to King Julien, Brodney was actually born before King Julien. Unlike his adopted brother, Brodney is more of a “lover than a ruler”. Brodney is married to Bronda, and has about three kids so far. Brodney will later be captured intoKoto’swar camp and star in a play produced by Mort, as a disguise for the escape from the Lemur Kingdom during Koto's Reign of all the known Kingdoms in Madagascar.

characters.name: Bada
characters.description: BadaPersonal DetailsGenderMaleSpeciesWestern lowland Gorilla(Gorilla Gorilla Gorilla)AgeUnknownStatusAliveOther InformationResides inGorilla HabitatCentral Park Zoo, NYProduction InformationFirst AppearanceTwo Feet High and RisingAdditional Appearance(s)Kingdom ComeLittle Zoo CoupeEclipsedMort UnboundSkorca!Mask of the RaccoonJungle LawAll King, No KingdomUntouchableOver PhilAn Elephant Never ForgetsZoo TubeThe Penguin Stays In the PictureTruth AcheHard Boiled EggyOperation: CootiesMr. TuxWishful ThinkingInvention InterventionCradle and AllThe All Nighter Before ChristmasWhispers and CoupsBrain DrainDanger Wears A CapeRat FinkKing Julien for a DayMaurice at PeaceCute-AstropheThe Return of the Revenge of Dr. BlowholePets PeevedByte-SizedOperation: Good DeedTime OutOur Man in GrrfurjiclestanGut InstinctArch-EnemyThe Big MoveLoathe at First SightThe Trouble With JigglesThe Most Dangerous Game NightHair ApparentNighty Night NinjaSiege the DayKing MeThumb DriveThe Terror of MadagascarMental HenHigh MoltageBest Laid PlantainsGoodnight and Good ChuckBest FoesNight of the VesuviusesVoiced byJohn DiMaggio Badais a grey gorilla. He lives withBingin theGorilla Habitatinside thezoo. He is strong, agile, and seems to be smarter than Bing. He served as a guard forMauriceinKingdom ComeandKing Julienon multiple occasions. He doesn't like sharing anything, especially air space and bananas.

characters.name: Banana
characters.description: BananaCharacter InformationNicknameJust a giant banana (Ted (lemur))FriendsTed (lemur)EnemiesTed (lemur)(sometimes)Resides (lives in)Kingdom of MadagascarTed’s hutDeathEaten by two of theRussian Space ChimpanzeesStatusDeceased (not confirmed yet)Job(s)Supposed manager of talent forTedProduction InformationFirst AppearanceEye of the CloverAdditional Appearance(s)I, MauriceThere Will Be JuiceThe End is Here Ted’s hut Banana isTed’ssupposed manager of talent. He is often associated with air horn sounds, and often sets Ted up for events which are different from the ones he was expecting (ex.I, Maurice, when Ted believed he was performing at a birthday party, when in reality he was performing at a bar).

characters.name: Baobab Worms
characters.description: Baobab WormsPersonal DetailsSpeciesUnknownOther InformationResides inMadagascarProduction InformationFirst AppearanceMadagascar: The Video Game Baobab Wormsare a fictional species of invertebrate that appears as drone enemies during the first half of the Madagascarvideo gamelevel "Coming of Age'. Baobab worms like to infest Baobab trees by eating into them and building mounds on the exterior of the tree. They are poisonous upon contact and can harm the player (asMelman). When the player approaches the worms, they will raise up the front of their bodies and lunge at the player to harm them.

characters.name: Baobab Worms

characters.name: Barry
characters.description:
BarryPersonal DetailsGenderMaleSpeciesStrawberry Poison Dart Frog (Oophaga pumilio)BirthHoboken ZooStatusAliveOther InformationResides inThe Reptile HousePoisonous Dart Frog ExhibitCentral Park Zoo, NYProduction InformationFirst AppearanceUntouchableAdditional Appearance(s)The Big SqueezeByte-SizedThe Most Dangerous Game NightThumb DriveBest FoesVoiced byKevin McDonald Barryis an adorable strawberry poison dart frog - however his touch can cause total paralysis.
He is a transfer from theHoboken Zoo, and he uses his poisonous touch to terrify other animals, and boss them around into doing whatever he wants. All he has to do is lift one finger as a threat. He is not the "hugging type" but he became nicer afterPrivateshows him affection through a contactless hug. He appears inThe Big Squeeze, but has no speaking role. Ironically if he had got out, he could have stoppedSaviocold in his tracks.

They reside in a cave, which is located in a forest in New Jersey.Bartholomewis a member of the colony (as ofKing of the Humble), and there are at least 19 other unnamed members of the colony.

characters.name: Becca
characters.description: BeccaPersonal DetailsGenderFemaleSpeciesWhite-headed Lemur(Eulemur albifrons)AgeMiddle-agedStatusAliveFamilyAbner(Husband)Other InformationFriendsDorothyResides inMadagascarProduction InformationFirst AppearanceKing MeAdditional Appearance(s)Poll PositionEnter the FanalokaEmpty is the HeadViva MortOne More CupMy Fair FoosaPineapple Of My EyeGimmie Gimmie Gimmie: The GameDaddy JulienClose Encounters of the Mort KindFast Food Lemur NationGet Off My LawnRun for the BorderWho Arted?The Good BookJulien 2.0Spin CycleBlackboard JungleLord of the Fruit FliesKing Julien is Watching YouThe End is NearThe End is HereVoiced bySarah Thyre Julien 2.0Spin CycleBlackboard JungleLord of the Fruit FliesKing Julien is Watching YouThe End is NearThe End is Here Beccais a character fromAll Hail King Julien. She is a hillbilly lemur and an anti-monarchist, becoming the faithful leader of theLemur Alliance Liberation Army(LALA) ever since King Julien supposedly murdered/martyred Banana Guy Mike. Becca is shown to be mischievous, creative, and a skilled leader, though she doesn't put her leadership skills to good use. She used to have respect for King Julien, but in "Empty is the Head," a disguised King Julien cluelessly led her and Abner to start a revolution against him. Becca, from that episode on, believed that King Julien is tyrannical and doesn't care about his subjects, therefore leading her and Abner to make numerous creative attempts to kill King Julien throughout the series. Especially enforced by Becca, she and Abner call themselves the "Lemur Alliance Liberation Army," or "LALA," for short. Though she believed that the revolution was built on there being a lack of true need for a monarch, she was ambitious enough to suggest that she become the new ruler of theKingdom of Madagascarafter realising that the elimination of King Julien could leave the position vacant.

characters.name: Becky
characters.description: BeckyPersonal DetailsGenderFemaleSpeciesAmerican Badger(Taxidea taxus)StatusAliveOther InformationFriendsStacy, Marlene (sometimes), Private (sometimes), Skipper (sometimes), Kowalski (sometimes), Rico (sometimes), Kendall, James, Carlos, and LoganEnemiesMarlene (sometimes), Private (sometimes), Skipper (sometimes), Kowalski (sometimes), Rico (sometimes)Resides inBadger exhibitCentral Park Zoo, NYProduction InformationFirst AppearanceBadger PrideAdditional Appearance(s)Tunnel of LoveVoiced byJennette McCurdy Becky is one of the badgers that appeared inBadger Pride. She lives with another badger namedStacy; their relationship is not mentioned in the episode (they could be related, or just friends). Privatewas initially fearful of badgers, but Becky and Stacy won his heart by giving him Peanut Butter Winkies. After Private left, Becky and Stacy started badgeringMarleneinto doing wild and crazy things with them. Marlene, annoyed, tells them to stop badgering her. Becky is one of the badgers that appeared inBadger Pride. She lives with another badger namedStacy; their relationship is not mentioned in the episode (they could be related, or just friends). Privatewas initially fearful of badgers, but Becky and Stacy won his heart by giving him Peanut Butter Winkies. After Private left, Becky and Stacy started badgeringMarleneinto doing wild and crazy things with them. Marlene, annoyed, tells them to stop badgering her. Unfortunately, Badgers do not take kindly to badger stereotyping, and chased Marlene around. However, they were eventually defeated when Marlene fell outside the park. After that incident,Stacyand her appear to respect and fear Marlene, since they all have a picnic with the penguins in the park. Stacy and Becky both make a reappearance inTunnel of Love, where they fall in love with the beavers and romance interferes with the beavers' work.

characters.name: Bella Bon Bueno
characters.description:
Bella Bon BuenoPersonal DetailsGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanProduction InformationFirst AppearanceBrush with DangerVoiced byLeigh-Allyn Baker  Bella is a world-famous art critic, called in to decide whetherBurt's paintings are worthy enough to make it into the Art Museum of New York. In front of the three paintings, she shuns two of them off and is probably about to do so with the third butKowalski's blueprints fly onto the canvas and Bella, ecstatic, orders the painting (blueprints) to be sent off to the museum immediately. Anyway, the penguins successfully change a "plus" sign on the blueprints to a Lunacorn to avoid that an evil genius who could see the plans at the museum would use them to build a device which could probably destroy the world. The morning of the unveiling of the painting Bella sees the Lunacorn and declaring it "Amateurish fraud!" she rips off the bottom half with the Lunacorn on it and slams it against the cameraman's camera lens recording the unveiling in a frenzy. Back at HQ Kowalski is sad because "Art critics can be socruel!" 
She speaks with what seems like a French accent. She is Alice's best friend
